name: Source Control
description: Git source control panel — branches, staging, commits, stash, and history with graph visualization.
author: contex

actions.name: refresh
actions.description: Refresh git status, branches, and history

actions.name: commit
actions.description: Create a commit. Params: { message: string }

actions.name: stageFile
actions.description: Stage a file. Params: { path: string }

actions.name: unstageFile
actions.description: Unstage a file. Params: { path: string }

actions.name: createBranch
actions.description: Create new branch. Params: { name: string }

actions.name: stash
actions.description: Stash current changes. Params: { message?: string }

actions.name: getStatus
actions.description: Get current git status as JSON

actions.name: getLog
actions.description: Get commit history. Params: { max?: number }
